heading: Supplemental assistance to funds provided to local educational agencies
label: 5356 Supplemental assistance to funds provided to local educational agencies
text: The assistance provided in this chapter for the education of Indians in the public schools of any State is in addition and supplemental to assistance provided under title VI of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965 [ et seq.].20 U.S.C. 7401
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , known as the Indian Self-Determination and Education Assistance Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 93–63888 Stat. 2203section 5301 of this titleJan. 4, 1975The Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965, referred to in text, is , , . Title VI of the Act is classified generally to subchapter VI (§ 7401 et seq.) of chapter 70 of Title 20, Education. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 89–1079 Stat. 27section 6301 of Title 20Apr. 11, 1965
CodificationSection was formerly classified to prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.section 458e of this title

Amendments2015— substituted “assistance provided under title VI of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965.” for “assistance provided under title IX of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965.”Pub. L. 114–951994— substituted “title IX of the Elementary and Secondary Education Act of 1965” for “title IV of the Act of ()”.Pub. L. 103–38286 Stat. 235June 23, 1972
